scripts.validate:openclaw-connection: tsx --test scripts/openclaw-connection-state.test.ts scripts/openclaw-discovery.test.ts scripts/openclaw-host.test.ts scripts/openclaw-local-runtime.test.ts scripts/openclaw-runtime-readiness.test.ts scripts/openclaw-recovery-report.test.ts scripts/openclaw-recovery-audit.test.ts scripts/openclaw-retry-guidance.test.ts scripts/openclaw-retry-policy.test.ts
scripts.generate:canvas-doc-assets: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.tmp-canvas-doc-assets', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.canvas-doc-assets.json && node ./.tmp-canvas-doc-assets/scripts/generate-canvas-doc-assets.js
scripts.validate:routing: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.tmp-routing-validation', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.routing-validation.json && node ./.tmp-routing-validation/scripts/validate-routing.js
scripts.pack: npm run sync:openclaw-managed-runtime && npm run build:assets && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.dist: npm run sync:openclaw-managed-runtime && npm run build:assets && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac: npm run sync:openclaw-managed-runtime && npm run build:assets && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run sync:openclaw-managed-runtime && npm run build:assets && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
